expectations.text: Detects #f5f5f5 as a hardcoded hex color value and flags it as BLOCKING severity
Detects rgb(51, 51, 51) as a hardcoded color value and flags it as BLOCKING severity
Detects 8px border-radius as a hardcoded value and flags it as WARNING severity
Detects 16px/24px padding as hardcoded spacing and flags it as SERIOUS severity
Detects 14px font-size as hardcoded typography and flags it as SERIOUS severity
Suggests specific token replacements for hardcoded values
expectations.evidence: Each row has 'Should Be' column with specific tokens: var(--card-bg) -> var(--bg-surface), var(--card-radius) -> var(--radii-sm), var(--card-padding-y)/var(--card-padding-x) -> var(--size-*), var(--card-font-size) -> var(--font-size-14)

expectations.text: Does NOT flag existing correct token usage like var(--color-border-primary) or var(--space-300) as violations
expectations.evidence: 'Tokens Consumed Correctly' section lists --color-border-primary, --space-300 etc. as correct usage

expectations.text: Output follows a structured audit report format with clear sections (not freeform prose)
expectations.evidence: Report has structured sections: 'Hardcoded Values Found' table, 'Color Track', 'Structural Track', 'Tokens Consumed Correctly', 'Summary'

expectations.text: Correctly distinguishes color track violations as BLOCKING from structural track violations as WARNING or SERIOUS
expectations.evidence: Color values (#f5f5f5, rgb(51,51,51), #1a1a1a) are BLOCKING. Spacing (16px/24px) and font-size (14px, 18px) are SERIOUS. Radius (8px) is WARNING.

expectations.text: References the token naming convention when suggesting replacement tokens
expectations.evidence: Replacement suggestions follow naming conventions: var(--card-bg) -> var(--bg-surface), var(--radii-sm), var(--size-*), var(--font-size-14)

eval_feedback.overall: Strong eval set. All assertions are discriminating — the without-skill version failed several of these (no severity levels, no token replacement suggestions).
